title: INERRA Ribbon Multipack - 3 x 100 Yard Rolls (Red, White and Hunter Green)
features: INERRA Brand - Ribbon Multipack Bundle - Pack of 3 Rolls - 1 Roll of Each Colour
Each roll measures 100 Yards x 2" wide (91m x 50mm)
Waterproof ribbon for a whole range of florist, wedding and craft uses. Use for gift wrapping and seasonal decorations.
Hardwearing, waterproof and easy to cut. For indoor and outdoor use.
Ideal for all seasonal, christmas, craft and floral uses
description: INERRA Ribbon Multipack - 3 colours. Pack of 3 Rolls. Each roll measures 100 Yards (91 Metres). The width of the ribbon is 2" (50mm). Poly ribbon for a whole variety of arts and crafts uses. Ideal for floral, craft and weddings uses, this waterproof ribbon is ideal for wedding cars. Use for making bows as well as decorating hampers and baskets. Ideal for all christmas, craft and floral decoratrions.
